# Issue Log

## Purpose
Track, prioritize, and resolve project issues across predictive, agile, and hybrid delivery.

## Audience
Project Manager, Risk & Issue Manager, Delivery Leads, PMO.

## Inputs
- Risk register (`docs/methodology/waterfall/templates/risk-register.xlsx`).
- Status reports (`docs/templates/shared/status-report.md`).
- Change log (`docs/templates/shared/change-log.md`).

## Classification Guidance
Use a consistent classification to signal urgency and escalation.
- **Blocker:** Stops delivery or violates governance (requires immediate escalation).
- **Critical:** Major impact to scope/schedule/cost/quality; mitigation within 1–2 reporting cycles.
- **High:** Significant impact; mitigation required and tracked in weekly status.
- **Medium:** Manageable impact; resolve within planned work.
- **Low:** Minor impact; monitor and address when capacity allows.

## Issue Log Entries
| Issue ID | Date Raised | Description | Impact | Priority | Owner | Status | Target Resolution Date | Resolution Actions | Comments |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Each issue has an owner, priority, and target resolution date.
- [ ] Blocker/critical issues have documented escalation paths.
- [ ] Resolution actions are updated during each reporting cycle.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Issue log reflects current status, owners, and resolution actions.
- High-priority issues are escalated and time-bound.
